pickup.name: Volcanic Core
pickup.effect: Increases heat generation of geological spells

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab cracks the sea floor, opening a path to the Abyssal Grotto.

pickup.name: Compressed Pumice
pickup.effect: Allows player to float through high-density water currents

encounters.trigger: The serpent's death gasp triggers an underwater earthquake revealing a hidden chamber.

pickup.name: Heart of the Trench
pickup.effect: Provides an impenetrable tectonic shield

encounters.trigger: Opening the vault with the tectonic shield triggers the main gate to the Boss Chamber.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Deep
boss.victory_condition: Use the Heart of the Trench to collapse the ceiling onto the beast

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen geological anchor from the depths.

pickup.name: Glowing Pearl
pickup.effect: Illuminates dark trenches

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab reveals a path to the light-deprived caves

pickup.name: Binding Kelp
pickup.effect: Slows enemy movement

encounters.trigger: Using the pearl reveals the nest of the apex guardian

pickup.name: Ancient Conch Shell
pickup.effect: Summons protective currents

encounters.trigger: The eel drops a key that unlocks the boss arena

boss.name: Great Guardian Turtle
boss.victory_condition: Use the shell to pacify the turtle and restore peace to the reef

level.objective: Restore balance to the Sunken Crystal Gardens by calming the Great Guardian
level.reward: Guardian's Blessing and underwater speed boost

level.setting: The Sunken Spires of Abyssal Veil

pickup.name: Essence of Phosphor
pickup.effect: Allows the player to see weak points in spectral armor

encounters.trigger: Defeating the guard causes the heavy iron gate to the Inner Sanctum to creak open

pickup.name: Frozen Sea-Heart
pickup.effect: Chills enemy cores to make them brittle

encounters.trigger: The death scream of the eel shatters the structural integrity of the bridge leading to the boss lair

pickup.name: Void Anchor
pickup.effect: Negates boss regeneration

encounters.trigger: Securing the Void Anchor unlocks the final vault seal behind the knight, revealing the Boss

boss.name: Leviathan Bone-Lord
boss.victory_condition: Anchor the beast to the trench floor to prevent it from escaping and self-healing

level.objective: Purge the necromantic curse from the Sunken Spires

pickup.name: Super-Conductive Coil
pickup.effect: Increases lightning arc range and damage

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the first airlock engages the security drones in the lab

pickup.name: Thermal Fuse
pickup.effect: Grants short-burst heat discharge

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the research data unlocks the containment cell gate

pickup.name: Void Core
pickup.effect: Allows the player to stabilize the pressure barrier around the Boss chamber

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Guardian allows access to the central chamber where the boss resides

boss.name: Leviathan Siphon
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Void Core while the boss attempts to drain the facility

level.objective: Retrieve the research data and purge the facility of all biological and machine threats

pickup.name: Bioluminescent Vial
pickup.effect: Provides temporary vision in deep darkness

encounters.trigger: Defeating the prowler reveals a flickering console that powers the hallway light

pickup.name: High-Pressure Hydraulic Fluid
pickup.effect: Can be used to grease heavy machinery

encounters.trigger: The guard drops a master key card needed to access the Reactor Core

pickup.name: Ancient Signal Beacon
pickup.effect: Used to lure the final guardian from its lair

encounters.trigger: Activating the beacon signals the boss to emerge from the central chamber

boss.name: Leviathan Prime
boss.victory_condition: Overload the beacon while it is attached to the boss's dorsal fin

level.objective: Navigate the facility to neutralize the Leviathan Prime and restore the surface link.
level.reward: Abyssal Shadow Cloak and permanent breath capacity increase.

pickup.name: Pressurized Oxygen Tank
pickup.effect: Increases movement speed and resistance to water pressure

encounters.trigger: Opening the airlock releases the eel and reveals the path to the main reactor room

encounters.hazard: Flickering arc electricity across the floor

pickup.name: High-Voltage Capacitor
pickup.effect: Allows the player to temporarily overcharge their thermal attacks

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the reactor triggers a security lockdown that summons the boss

pickup.name: Core Coolant Catalyst
pickup.effect: Essential component to stabilize heat levels during final confrontation

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crawler shatters the glass, granting direct access to the Boss Chamber

boss.name: Leviathan Mech-Construct
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the reactor before the facility implodes

level.objective: Escape the facility by stabilizing the reactor core before the structural integrity fails.

pickup.name: Super-Conductive Coil
pickup.effect: Charges weapon to deal electrical damage

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the airlock security grid initiates the patrol route of the next entity.

pickup.name: Thermal Vent Regulator
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to extreme heat

encounters.trigger: Releasing the coolant valve draws the boss from its nesting chamber.

pickup.name: Emergency Oxygen Core
pickup.effect: Restores health and provides temporary invulnerability

encounters.trigger: Activating the Emergency Oxygen Core forces the final boss to breach the primary seal.

boss.name: The Leviathan Warden
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Oxygen Core within the Leviathan's primary intake vent

level.objective: Purge the station of hostiles and secure the core.

pickup.name: Sun-Refraction Lens
pickup.effect: Increases light-based damage and reveals hidden passages

encounters.trigger: Defeating the pufferfish causes a path of bubbles to guide the player to the next chamber

pickup.name: Glowing Kelp Essence
pickup.effect: Allows the player to breathe underwater indefinitely and provides a healing aura

encounters.trigger: Clearing the ink fog reveals a glowing kelp bridge leading to the final sanctuary

pickup.name: Prism-Crystal Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the grand gate to the boss arena

encounters.trigger: Winning the dance-off with the crab unlocks the gate for the final encounter

boss.name: The Illusionist's Reflection Kraken
boss.victory_condition: Use the key to shatter the Kraken's illusory armor, rendering it vulnerable to a final strike

level.objective: Retrieve the lost Harmony Pearl hidden within the grotto
level.reward: The Title of Master Illusionist and a permanent underwater breathing skill

pickup.name: Fermented Berry Potion
pickup.effect: Increases movement speed and attack agility

encounters.trigger: Defeating the monkey awakens the jungle guardian nearby

pickup.name: Sun-Etched Amulet
pickup.effect: Stuns dark-aligned creatures with searing light

encounters.trigger: The jaguar drops a key fragment that opens the inner chamber

pickup.name: Dragonscale Tincture
pickup.effect: Provides absolute immunity to toxic breath

encounters.trigger: Drinking the tincture draws the attention of the colossal Alpha Titan

boss.name: Alpha Titan Primal Ape
boss.victory_condition: Inflict enough damage while immune to the boss's poisonous roar

level.objective: Navigate the ruins and slay the Alpha Titan to reclaim the jungle throne

pickup.name: Sun-Dried Herb Bundle
pickup.effect: Restores health and glows when near hidden artifacts

encounters.trigger: Defeating the stalker reveals a path to the Sunken Ruins

pickup.name: Ancient Sapphire Lens
pickup.effect: Magnifies light and weakens crystalline structures

encounters.trigger: Activating the lens clears the path to the Altar of Souls

pickup.name: Crystalline Keystone
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Inner Sanctum gates

encounters.trigger: Using the keystone on the gate triggers the final boss encounter

boss.name: Primeval Serpent of Shadow
boss.victory_condition: Channel the keystone energy into the serpent's core to banish it

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Jungle before the jungle consumes you

pickup.name: Antivenom Serum
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to jungle toxins

encounters.trigger: Corpse of the Stalker reveals a hidden pressure plate that opens the gate to the Ruins

enemy.name: Armored Temple Guardian
enemy.weakness: Antivenom Serum applied to the blade to corrode armor

pickup.name: Sun-Etched Lens
pickup.effect: Refracts light to blind shadowy entities

encounters.trigger: Guardian's destruction deactivates the courtyard traps allowing entry to the Sanctum

pickup.name: Ancient Heartstone
pickup.effect: Increases critical hit damage significantly

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Creeper causes the ceiling to descend, revealing the boss altar

boss.name: Void Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Heartstone into the Serpent's core to render it mortal

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen jungle idol from the heart of the ruins
level.reward: The Silent Step Boots and permanent increase to stealth capacity

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Nectar
pickup.effect: Restores 20 health

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker reveals a hidden path to the Grove of Echoes

pickup.name: Crystalized Moonlight
pickup.effect: Increases attack speed

encounters.trigger: Cleansing the sprite clears the path to the Elder Tree

pickup.name: Heart of the Forest
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to boss fire attacks

encounters.trigger: Subduing the jaguar awakens the boss

boss.name: Ancient Guardian of the Canopy
boss.victory_condition: Use Heart of the Forest to pacify the Guardian

level.objective: Restore balance to the sacred Grove
level.reward: Guardian's Blessing and the title of High Warden

pickup.name: Vial of Ancient Venom
pickup.effect: Coats the scythe in corrosive toxins

encounters.trigger: Defeating the monkey clears the vines blocking the Altar of Decay

pickup.name: Cursed Obsidian Eye
pickup.effect: Reveals the structural weak points of stone entities

encounters.trigger: The spirit collapses the wall, exposing the central Temple Sanctum

pickup.name: Essence of the Ancient Gatekeeper
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss chamber's magical barrier

encounters.trigger: The Shaman's death grants access to the boss chamber

boss.name: Malakor the Root-Bound Titan
boss.victory_condition: Use the Essence to weaken the Titan's armor before delivering the final blow

level.objective: Purify the corruption of the forest by defeating the Root-Bound Titan

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Pollen
pickup.effect: Increases bubble damage intensity

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Gourdling causes a trail of pollen to reveal a secret path to the river.

pickup.name: Crystallized Dew Drop
pickup.effect: Allows bubble to freeze organic surfaces

encounters.trigger: Freezing the monkey's favorite banana tree opens a vine bridge to the Temple entrance.

pickup.name: Ancient Alchemist's Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Forbidden Sanctum door

encounters.trigger: Opening the Sanctum door summons the Temple Guardian boss.

boss.name: Grand Elder Snap-Dragon
boss.victory_condition: Use the key to neutralize the dragon's magic-draining aura before landing the final strike.

level.objective: Retrieve the Essence of Spring from the Grand Elder Snap-Dragon to save the Glimmering Canopy.
level.reward: Master Alchemist's Cloak and infinite bubble juice.

pickup.name: Stasis Resin
pickup.effect: Temporarily slows enemy movement

encounters.trigger: Opening the gate releases a swarm that alerts the second guardian.

pickup.name: Temporal Shard
pickup.effect: Allows a blink-dash ability

encounters.trigger: Defeating the jaguar reveals a shimmering path leading to the ruins.

pickup.name: Heart of the Forest
pickup.effect: Used to awaken the main boss's mechanism

encounters.trigger: Placing the Heart into the socket opens the path to the inner sanctum.

boss.name: The Chrono-Devourer Titan
boss.victory_condition: Use the Heart to reverse the boss's age until it becomes a seedling

level.objective: Restore the temporal flow of the jungle by cleansing the corrupted Titan.

level.setting: An overgrown, abandoned colonial outpost deep within a dying rainforest where the silence is heavy.

encounters.hazard: Sinking mud pits that reduce movement speed

pickup.name: Corroded Iron Solvent
pickup.effect: Dissolves hardened organic armor

encounters.trigger: Defeating the stalker draws the attention of the sentry drone patrolling the nearby armory.

pickup.name: Starlight Catalyst Vial
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding pulse that destabilizes spectral shields

encounters.trigger: The drone's explosion clears the rubble blocking the path to the ancient temple altar.

pickup.name: Essence of the Ancient Heart
pickup.effect: Nullifies boss armor

encounters.trigger: The guardian's death removes the seal on the inner sanctuary where the Boss resides.

boss.name: The Rot-King
boss.victory_condition: Use the Heart to strip his immunity before delivering the final strike with the Cleaver.

level.objective: Traverse the cursed jungle to execute the Rot-King and restore the forest's life cycle.
level.reward: The legendary Berserker's Mantle and infinite stamina.
